Name: Firebolt
Text: Cast a firebolt that deals fire damage.

Name: Mysticism
Text: Permanently double your spell damage at the start of each turn.

Name: Cleave
Text: Slash in a 180° arc dealing damage to all enemies in front.

Name: Whirlwind
Text: Spin in a 360° area for 3 seconds, dealing 10 damage per second to all nearby enemies.

Name: Fireball
Text: Launch a fireball that explodes on impact, dealing area damage and leaving burning ground. Enemies on the fire take 2 damage per second.

Name: Mob Heal
Text: Heal the most wounded ally for a large amount.

Name: Greater Area of Effect
Text: The next Area card played this turn has increased area of effect.

Name: Greater Attack Damage
Text: The next Attack card played this turn deals increased damage.
